description: Letter from a certain Yiṣḥaq to Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm b. Ḥujayj b. Yūsuf. In Judaeo-Arabic. The addressee is known from other early to mid-11th century documents. The sender had asked for a piece (qiṭʿa) of something, but it didn't arrive in time, and now the need has passed. He now asks for malāff(?) ẓāhiriyya(?) from Dār al-Bayḍ ("Casablanca"), perhaps a type of garment. Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm b. ʿAbdallāh al-Baghdādī should send it to him with the muleteer (ḥammār).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
